name: asymmetric_taper
notes: Trapezoid (0,0)-(8,1.5)-(8,2.5)-(0,4). Top/bottom edges both have slope 1.5/8=0.1875 (parallel). L_norm=sqrt(1.5^2+8^2)=8.139410mm. Midline y=2.0 equidistant from both slanted edges for all x. x_L=1.659853mm (slant=left_wall_dist), width=3.3197mm. x_R=7.397537mm (slant=right_wall_dist), width=1.2049mm. EP.cpp trim: spine has NO open endpoints (both ends terminate at 2D degenerate cap regions) -> trim rule does not apply. Spine SURVIVES. 2870 points at 0.002mm steps, width=2*(16-1.5x)/8.1394.
